[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1111001111 8
1 0110011101 6
2 0000000000 a
3 0001011000 3
4 1001110110 6
5 1011110011 7
6 0011110101 6
7 0100000001 2

01 10 0001010000 2
12 21 1001110010 5
23 32 0011110001 5
34 43 0000000001 1
45 54 0100000001 2 match 7
56 65 0111001011 6
67 76 0110001101 5
70 07 0000011000 2

02 20 0001010000 2
13 31 0001110100 4
24 42 0000000001 1
35 53 0011010001 4
46 64 0100000001 2 match 7
57 75 0110011001 5
60 06 0001001000 2
71 17 0000010100 2

03 30 0001010000 2
14 41 0000000000 a match 2
25 52 0011010011 5
36 63 0011000101 4
47 74 0100000001 2 match 7
50 05 0001011000 3 match 3
61 16 1001000110 4
72 27 0010010001 3

04 40 0000000000 a match 2
15 51 0001010010 3
26 62 1011000011 5
37 73 0010010101 4
[completion]

1 absent
